settings.heading: ALL OVER SPRAY HOUSE
settings.description: Made to be mixed, find your mix.
settings.marquee_text: DISCOVER THE ART OF LAYERING    •    CRAFT YOUR SIGNATURE SCENT    •    MODERN FRAGRANCE HOUSE

settings.heading: ETCHED IN TIME
settings.text: Experience the ultimate luxury of customization. Every bottle tells a story, and now you can etch yours forever with our bespoke engraving service.

settings.heading: SCENT LAYERING
settings.description: Layering the scents together: all of our sprays are designed to be mixed, so you can do more than a combo to mix your perfumes.
settings.feature_1_text: Craft a signature that is uniquely yours by blending distinct base foundations.
settings.feature_2_text: Shared molecular bonds allow for seamless transitions between different scents.
settings.feature_3_text: Our formula ensures that overlapping sprays enhance rather than compete.
settings.feature_4_text: Experience how different layers reveal themselves across hours of wear.
